The '''Rellarins''' were [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] bipeds indigenous to [[Rellnas Minor]], a moon orbiting the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Rellnas]] in the [[Rell system]].

==Biology and appearance==
Taller than most [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]], Rellarins had an imposing appearance, with hands twice as broad as those of [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], thick brown shell plates covering their bodies, and faces dominated by feeding spikes. Despite this imposing appearance, they were among the most peaceful, humble, and spiritual cultures in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], widely respected for their wisdom, ethics, and reverence for nature.<ref name="GG12" />

==Society and culture==
Though Rellnas Minor had a varied environment, Rellarins primarily inhabited the polar regions of their moon. The [[Marbaral Peninsula]], the [[Kanal island chain]], and the [[Riha Archipelago]] were home to a variety of Rellarin communities. There were at least 57 distinct cultural groups among the Rellarins, each with their own language and religious practices. A typical Rellarin spoke four or more languages, usually those of their own tribes and their neighbors. [[Nanilas]], the basis of the languages of the Riha Archipelago, was the most common root language.<ref name="GG12" />

With a reverence for nature similar to the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]], the Rellarins showed little interest in advanced technology. Few Rellarins left their homeworld, as they preferred to lead a simple, primitive life, with stone tools and clothes made from leather, furs, and homespun cloth. Their only export was their wisdom: their tribal leaders, or [[un'Yala]], drew on their decades of experience and insight gained from hour-long ritual dances to answer difficult ethical and political questions. These sages were often [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]], and averaged well over two hundred years of age. The wisdom of the un'Yala was so admired by the [[Swaze]] of the [[Jidlor system/Legends|Jidlor system]] that their political leaders visited Rellnas Minor every standard year to seek their advice. [[Tanlin Sha]] was the main un'Yala who advised the Swaze during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="GG12" /> Later, the wisdom of the Rellarin served the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]—[[New Republic Observer]] [[Moshene Tre]] was also a Rellarin un'Yala.<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>

Rellarins were also noted and admired for their competitiveness in sports. This was an expression of the strong work ethic in their culture, and was generally focused more on a desire to best personal records than the desire to defeat opponents.<ref name="GG12" /> [[Lunkar An]], a Rellarin [[Scout/Legends|scout]] with the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]], was a more extreme example of Rellarin competitiveness. In contrast with the stereotypically peaceful Rellarin personality, he had a fierce vendetta against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operatives [[Ma'w'shiye]] and [[Sisquoc]] after they beat his survival records on the planet [[Thrantin]].<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> Most Rellarin athletes were not so hostile towards those who bested them, however.<ref name="GG12" />
